title: ODI Matrix — Heating Equipment (except Warm Air Furnaces) Manufacturing (NAICS 333414)

sections.title: Inputs
sections.content:
| Source | File | Count |
|---|---|---|
| **Step 06 — Market Needs (JTBD)** | `JTBD_heating_equipment_except_warm_air_furnac.md` | 33 error statements (N01–N28 incl. N12b, N14b, N14c, N15, N15b) |
| **Step 10 — Product-Related Needs** | `FIT_heating_equipment_except_warm_air_furnac.md` | 8 product-constraint needs (PR1–PR8) |
| **Step 03 — Incumbent Technologies** | `JTBD_heating_equipment_except_warm_air_furnac.md` (alternatives) | 5 alternatives: Turbine (55-65%), Ultrasonic (20-30%), Vortex (3-5%), DP Estimation (5-15%), Do nothing |
| **Step 09 — Feature-Market Fit** | `FIT_heating_equipment_except_warm_air_furnac.md` | 7 tech features, avg overall_fit = 5.25 |

---

sections.title: Step 1 — Error Statement Collection
sections.content:
33 market-level needs from Step 06 (preserve all fields) + 8 product-constraint needs from Step 10 (injected with `job_step_number=0`, `job_step_name="product_constraint"`, `impact_category="reliability"`, `product_related=true`).

**Total needs for scoring: 41**

---

sections.title: Step 2 — Satisfaction Recalibration (Incumbent Evidence)
sections.content:
Incumbent technology profiles used for recalibration:

| Technology | Share | Strengths | Weaknesses |
|---|---|---|---|
| Impeller/Turbine | 55-65% | Low cost, simple, established supply chain | Magnetite fouling, bearing wear, calibration drift ±5%/yr, 3-5yr life, pressure drop |
| Ultrasonic (transit-time) | 20-30% | No moving parts, no pressure drop, bidirectional | Air entrainment >2% degrades accuracy, pipe-full required, 2-3x cost, commissioning |
| Vortex | 3-5% | Robust to dirty media | Pressure drop (bluff body), poor low-flow accuracy, vibration-sensitive |
| DP Estimation | 5-15% | Zero hardware cost | ±15-20% accuracy, no direct measurement, no anomaly detection, pump curve drift |

**Recalibration result:** Original satisfaction scores from Step 06 were derived with incumbent awareness. Cross-checking against incumbent profiles confirms scores are well-calibrated. Key validations:

- N07 (air detection, sat=3): Confirmed — turbine sensors cannot detect air; they give wrong readings silently. Ultrasonic sensors detect signal loss but not air quantity.
- N10 (magnetite seizure, sat=3): Confirmed — this IS the turbine's fundamental failure mode; no mitigation exists in the sensor itself.
- N25 (documented efficiency, sat=3): Confirmed — turbine sensors provide pulse output only, no integrated temperature, no onboard energy calculation capability.
- N01/N04/N24 (sat=5): Confirmed — turbine sensors deliver adequate baseline accuracy/detection/reliability when new, but degrade; ultrasonic maintains performance over life.

**All 41 scores retained as recalibrated values.**

---

sections.title: Step 3 — Opportunity Scores (Deterministic)
sections.content:
**Formula:** `opportunity_score = importance + max(importance - satisfaction, 0)`
**Underserved:** `importance > 7 AND satisfaction < 5`
**Overserved:** `importance < 3 AND satisfaction > 7`

### Step 06 Needs (33 from JTBD)

| ID | Statement (abbreviated) | Step | Imp | Sat | Opp | Under | Over | product_related |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| N15b | Undetected faults invisible to DP estimation | MONITOR | 8 | 2 | **14.00** | true | false | true |
| N01 | Flow reading deviation >±3% across range | EXECUTE | 9 | 5 | **13.00** | false | false | false |
| N04 | Detect flow stoppage >2 s | MONITOR | 9 | 5 | **13.00** | false | false | false |
| N07 | Undetected air entrainment >2% vol | MONITOR | 8 | 3 | **13.00** | true | false | false |
| N10 | Turbine rotor seizure from magnetite <3 yr | EXECUTE | 8 | 3 | **13.00** | true | false | true |
| N12 | Calibration drift >±5% from bearing wear | EXECUTE | 8 | 3 | **13.00** | true | false | true |
| N14c | Distinguish zero-flow from signal loss | EXECUTE | 8 | 3 | **13.00** | true | false | true |
| N24 | Field failure rate >0.1% in 15-yr life | EXECUTE | 9 | 5 | **13.00** | false | false | false |
| N25 | Documented measured efficiency for EcoDesign | DEFINE | 8 | 3 | **13.00** | true | false | false |
| N03 | Measurement degradation at ΔT >20°C | EXECUTE | 8 | 4 | **12.00** | true | false | false |
| N06 | Sensor range misses min-modulation flow | DEFINE | 8 | 4 | **12.00** | true | false | false |
| N09 | Failure with glycol >50% | EXECUTE | 8 | 4 | **12.00** | true | false | false |
| N15 | DP estimate error >±15% at part-load | EXECUTE | 7 | 2 | **12.00** | false | false | true |
| N19 | Single-point flow + temperature | EXECUTE | 8 | 4 | **12.00** | true | false | false |
| N22 | Thermal energy calc noise at low modulation | EXECUTE | 8 | 4 | **12.00** | true | false | false |
| N23 | Hydraulic imbalance >±10% at commissioning | CONFIRM | 8 | 4 | **12.00** | true | false | false |
| N26 | A-rated label on first certification attempt | DEFINE | 8 | 4 | **12.00** | true | false | false |
| N11 | Annual maintenance for cleaning/inspection | MAINTAIN | 7 | 3 | **11.00** | false | false | true |
| N12b | Turbine low-flow dead band <3 l/min | EXECUTE | 7 | 3 | **11.00** | false | false | true |
| N20 | Detect incipient pump degradation | MONITOR | 7 | 3 | **11.00** | false | false | false |
| N27 | Installer-visible measured performance data | DEFINE | 7 | 3 | **11.00** | false | false | false |
| N28 | Callback within 30 days from imbalance | CONFIRM | 7 | 3 | **11.00** | false | false | false |
| N02 | Repeatability >±0.5% | EXECUTE | 8 | 6 | **10.00** | false | false | false |
| N08 | Non-ideal flow profile error | EXECUTE | 7 | 4 | **10.00** | false | false | false |
| N14 | Signal loss from transient air pockets | EXECUTE | 7 | 4 | **10.00** | false | false | true |
| N16b | Mounting location turbulence >2% bias | LOCATE | 7 | 4 | **10.00** | false | false | false |
| N05 | Turndown ratio for full-load to min-mod | EXECUTE | 7 | 5 | **9.00** | false | false | false |
| N16 | Installation footprint and straight-run | LOCATE | 7 | 5 | **9.00** | false | false | false |
| N17 | OEM integration time | PREPARE | 7 | 5 | **9.00** | false | false | false |
| N14b | OEM qualification cost for acoustic validation | PREPARE | 6 | 4 | **8.00** | false | false | true |
| N21 | Variant count to cover DN range | DEFINE | 6 | 4 | **8.00** | false | false | false |
| N13 | Commissioning config time (ultrasonic) | PREPARE | 6 | 5 | **7.00** | false | false | true |
| N18 | Undetected incorrect orientation | CONFIRM | 6 | 6 | **6.00** | false | false | false |

### Step 10 Needs (8 product-constraint needs)

| ID | Statement (abbreviated) | Source Constraint | Imp | Sat | Opp | Under | Over | product_related |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| PR3 | Low-modulation dead zones below 4.2 l/min DN20 | Min Flow Rate Detection | 8 | 4 | **12.00** | true | false | true |
| PR6 | Straight-pipe 5-10× DN footprint penalty in compact enclosures | Min Straight Pipe Run | 8 | 4 | **12.00** | true | false | true |
| PR4 | Micro-bubble entrainment >2% vol during filling/cold-start | Air Bubble Tolerance | 7 | 3 | **11.00** | false | false | true |
| PR2 | Polymer housing seal degradation at 80-90°C | Max Medium Temperature | 7 | 5 | **9.00** | false | false | true |
| PR7 | Cold-start temperature ramp outpaces NTC compensation | Temperature-Dependent Accuracy | 7 | 5 | **9.00** | false | false | true |
| PR8 | Glycol concentration shifts acoustic coupling baseline | Media Limitation | 6 | 4 | **8.00** | false | false | true |
| PR5 | Invalid measurement during drain-back solar-hybrid drain-down | Pipe Full Condition | 5 | 4 | **6.00** | false | false | true |
| PR1 | Hydronic additives shift acoustic impedance beyond coupling range | Media Limitation | 5 | 6 | **5.00** | false | false | true |

sections.title: Step 4 — Market ODI Summary
sections.content:
| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| **Market** | Heating Equipment (except Warm Air Furnaces) Manufacturing |
| **NAICS** | 333414 |
| **Total Needs Scored** | 41 |
| **Underserved Count** | 15 |
| **Overserved Count** | 0 |
| **Avg Opportunity Score** | 10.66 |

### Zone Distribution

| Zone | Score Range | Count | % |
|---|---|---|---|
| Highly Underserved | > 15 | 0 | 0% |
| Underserved | 12–15 | 18 | 44% |
| Appropriately Served | 10–12 | 12 | 29% |
| Overserved | < 10 | 11 | 27% |

### Top 5 Opportunities

| Rank | ID | Statement | Opp | Imp | Sat | Zone |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | N15b | Minimize undetected system faults (blocked filter, stuck valve) that DP estimation cannot sense | **14.00** | 8 | 2 | Underserved |
| 2 | N01 | Minimize flow reading deviation >±3% across 5–50 l/min range | **13.00** | 9 | 5 | Underserved |
| 3 | N04 | Minimize time to detect flow stoppage to <2 seconds | **13.00** | 9 | 5 | Underserved |
| 4 | N24 | Minimize field failure rate to <0.1% in 15-yr appliance life | **13.00** | 9 | 5 | Underserved |
| 5 | N07 | Minimize undetected air entrainment >2% vol degrading accuracy | **13.00** | 8 | 3 | Underserved |

*Tiebreaker: importance descending, then satisfaction ascending.*

Additional entries at 13.0: N10 (magnetite seizure), N12 (calibration drift), N14c (zero-flow vs signal loss), N25 (documented efficiency). All represent significant unmet needs.

---

sections.title: Step 5 — Cross-Check vs Feature-Market Fit (Step 09)
sections.content:
| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| ODI avg opportunity score | 10.66 |
| Feature-Fit avg (tech features) | 5.25 |

**Cross-check thresholds:**

| Condition | Threshold | Actual | Result |
|---|---|---|---|
| High opportunity, low feature fit | ODI avg > 12 AND Fit avg < 4 | 10.66, 5.25 | **No flag** |
| Low opportunity, high feature fit | ODI avg < 8 AND Fit avg > 7 | 10.66, 5.25 | **No flag** |

**No inconsistencies detected.** ODI average (10.66) indicates a market with solid but not extreme unmet needs. Feature-Fit average (5.25) indicates moderate technology alignment. The combination is consistent: this market has real opportunities that the ultrasonic technology partially addresses, with strongest alignment on reliability and diagnostic needs.

---

sections.title: Key Findings
sections.content:
| Insight | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Dominant opportunity theme** | Reliability + detection failures — 7 of 9 needs scoring ≥13 relate to measurement reliability, fault detection, or degradation prevention |
| **Incumbent vulnerability** | Turbine sensors (55-65% share) drive 4 of the top-9 needs: magnetite seizure (N10), calibration drift (N12), low-flow dead band (N12b), annual maintenance (N11) — all eliminated by ultrasonic technology |
| **Regulatory pull** | EU EcoDesign documented efficiency (N25, Opp=13) and A-rated certification (N26, Opp=12) create regulatory demand for integrated flow+temperature measurement |
| **Product-constraint risks** | 2 product-related needs score 12.0: low-modulation dead zones (PR3) and straight-pipe footprint (PR6) — both are design constraints Marquardt must address for OEM adoption |
| **DP estimation gap** | N15b (Opp=14.0, highest score) reflects the massive detection gap when OEMs use pump-curve estimation instead of direct measurement — strongest argument for sensor adoption |
| **No overserved needs** | Zero overserved needs indicates no incumbent over-delivers on any dimension — market is ripe for improvement across the board |

---

sections.title: QA Checklist
sections.content:
| # | Check | Pass Condition | Result |
|---|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Formula correct | Spot-check 5 entries match `opp = imp + max(imp - sat, 0)` | **PASS** — N15b: 8+max(6,0)=14; N01: 9+max(4,0)=13; N18: 6+max(0,0)=6; PR1: 5+max(-1,0)=5; N03: 8+max(4,0)=12 |
| Q2 | Underserved flags correct | All imp>7 AND sat<5 flagged, no others | **PASS** — 15 entries flagged; verified N01(imp=9,sat=5)=false, N07(imp=8,sat=3)=true |
| Q3 | Overserved flags correct | All imp<3 AND sat>7 flagged, no others | **PASS** — 0 entries; min importance=5 |
| Q4 | Need count preserved | Total ≥ Step 06 count (33) | **PASS** — 41 (33 + 8 from Step 10) |
| Q5 | Top-5 ordering correct | Sorted by descending opp score | **PASS** — 14.0, 13.0, 13.0, 13.0, 13.0 with importance tiebreaker |
| Q6 | Cross-check ran | ODI-Feature-Fit inconsistencies logged | **PASS** — no inconsistencies; both thresholds checked |

---

sections.title: Sources
sections.content:
- [SRC: JTBD_heating_equipment_except_warm_air_furnac] — 33 error statements (N01-N28), 5 alternatives with market share and trade-offs
- [SRC: FIT_heating_equipment_except_warm_air_furnac] — Step 10 product-related needs (8), Step 09 technology feature fit scores (7 features), Step 11 vendor feature fit (6 features)
- [SRC: 01_product_decomposition] — Product constraints driving Step 10 needs
- [SRC: 02_functional_promise] — Commodity FP and differentiators informing recalibration

rows.Count: 33 error statements (N01–N28 incl. N12b, N14b, N14c, N15, N15b)
5 alternatives: Turbine (55-65%), Ultrasonic (20-30%), Vortex (3-5%), DP Estimation (5-15%), Do nothing

rows.Strengths: Low cost, simple, established supply chain
rows.Weaknesses: Magnetite fouling, bearing wear, calibration drift ±5%/yr, 3-5yr life, pressure drop

rows.Strengths: No moving parts, no pressure drop, bidirectional
rows.Weaknesses: Air entrainment >2% degrades accuracy, pipe-full required, 2-3x cost, commissioning
Pressure drop (bluff body), poor low-flow accuracy, vibration-sensitive
±15-20% accuracy, no direct measurement, no anomaly detection, pump curve drift

rows.Statement (abbreviated): Undetected faults invisible to DP estimation
Turbine rotor seizure from magnetite <3 yr
Thermal energy calc noise at low modulation
A-rated label on first certification attempt
Signal loss from transient air pockets
Turndown ratio for full-load to min-mod
OEM qualification cost for acoustic validation
Variant count to cover DN range
Low-modulation dead zones below 4.2 l/min DN20
Straight-pipe 5-10× DN footprint penalty in compact enclosures
Cold-start temperature ramp outpaces NTC compensation
Glycol concentration shifts acoustic coupling baseline
Invalid measurement during drain-back solar-hybrid drain-down
Hydronic additives shift acoustic impedance beyond coupling range

rows.Value: Heating Equipment (except Warm Air Furnaces) Manufacturing

rows.Statement: Minimize undetected system faults (blocked filter, stuck valve) that DP estimation cannot sense
Minimize flow reading deviation >±3% across 5–50 l/min range
Minimize time to detect flow stoppage to <2 seconds
Minimize field failure rate to <0.1% in 15-yr appliance life
Minimize undetected air entrainment >2% vol degrading accuracy

rows.Detail: Reliability + detection failures — 7 of 9 needs scoring ≥13 relate to measurement reliability, fault detection, or degradation prevention

Turbine sensors (55-65% share) drive 4 of the top-9 needs: magnetite seizure (N10), calibration drift (N12), low-flow dead band (N12b), annual maintenance (N11) — all eliminated by ultrasonic technology
EU EcoDesign documented efficiency (N25, Opp=13) and A-rated certification (N26, Opp=12) create regulatory demand for integrated flow+temperature measurement
2 product-related needs score 12.0: low-modulation dead zones (PR3) and straight-pipe footprint (PR6) — both are design constraints Marquardt must address for OEM adoption
N15b (Opp=14.0, highest score) reflects the massive detection gap when OEMs use pump-curve estimation instead of direct measurement — strongest argument for sensor adoption
Zero overserved needs indicates no incumbent over-delivers on any dimension — market is ripe for improvement across the board

rows.Pass Condition: Spot-check 5 entries match `opp = imp + max(imp - sat, 0)`
All imp>7 AND sat<5 flagged, no others
All imp<3 AND sat>7 flagged, no others

top_opportunities: Minimize the number of undetected system faults (blocked filter, stuck valve) that DP estimation cannot sense because it has no direct flow measurement
Minimize the likelihood of volumetric flow reading deviating more than ±3% from true value across the 5–50 l/min operating range
Minimize time to detect a complete flow stoppage event (circulator failure or valve closure) to less than 2 seconds
Minimize the field failure rate of the flow sensing subsystem to below 0.1% within the 15-year appliance design life
Minimize the number of undetected air entrainment events exceeding 2% volume that silently degrade measurement accuracy

entities.recalibration_notes: Satisfaction scores validated against incumbent profiles (Turbine 55-65%, Ultrasonic 20-30%, Vortex 3-5%, DP Estimation 5-15%). All original Step 06 and Step 10 scores confirmed. Key validations: N07 air detection (sat=3 confirmed — incumbents cannot detect), N10 magnetite (sat=3 confirmed — fundamental turbine weakness), N25 documented efficiency (sat=3 confirmed — turbine pulse-only output has no temp integration).

cross_check.note: No cross-check flags triggered. ODI avg (10.66) and Feature-Fit avg (5.25) are consistent: moderate unmet needs with moderate technology alignment.
